mapper.select: SELECT seat_id AS seatId, round_id AS roundId, seat_row AS seatRow, seat_colume AS seatColume, grade, status FROM SEATS WHERE round_id = #{roundId} ORDER BY seat_row, seat_colume
SELECT seat_id AS seatId, round_id AS roundId, seat_row AS seatRow, seat_colume AS seatColume, grade, status FROM SEATS WHERE seat_id = #{seatId}
